heading: Community Navigator pilot program
label: 9013 Community Navigator pilot program
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the American Rescue Plan Act of 2021, and not as part of the CARES Act which in part comprises this chapter.

children.heading: Administration
children.label: 1 Administration
children.text: The term “Administration” means the Small Business Administration.

children.heading: Administrator
children.label: 2 Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Administrator of the Small Business Administration.

children.heading: Community navigator services
children.label: 3 Community navigator services
children.text: The term “community navigator services” means the outreach, education, and technical assistance provided by community navigators that target eligible businesses to increase awareness of, and participation in, programs of the Small Business Administration.

children.heading: Community navigator
children.label: 4 Community navigator
children.text: The term “community navigator” means a community organization, community financial institution as defined in , or other private nonprofit organization engaged in the delivery of community navigator services.section 636(a)(36)(A) of this title

children.heading: Eligible business
children.label: 5 Eligible business
children.text: The term “eligible business” means any small business concern, with priority for small business concerns owned and controlled by women (as defined in ), small business concerns owned and controlled by veterans (as defined in ), and socially and economically disadvantaged small business concerns (as defined in ).section 632(n) of this titlesection 632(q) of this titlesection 637(a)(4)(A) of this title

children.heading: Private nonprofit organization
children.label: 6 Private nonprofit organization
children.text: The term “private nonprofit organization” means an entity that is described in and exempt from tax under section 501(a) of such title.section 501(c) of title 26

children.label: A
children.text: a small business development center (as defined in );section 632 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: a women’s business center (as described in ); andsection 656 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: a chapter of the Service Corps of Retired Executives (as defined in ).section 637(b)(1)(B) of this title

children.heading: Small business concern
children.label: 8 Small business concern
children.text: The term “small business concern” has the meaning given under .section 632 of this title

children.heading: State
children.label: 9 State
children.text: The term “State” means a State of the United States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, American Samoa, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, and Guam, or an agency, instrumentality, or fiscal agent thereof.

children.heading: Unit of general local government
children.label: 10 Unit of general local government
children.text: The term “unit of general local government” means a county, city, town, village, or other general purpose political subdivision of a State.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Administrator of the Small Business Administration shall establish a Community Navigator pilot program to make grants to, or enter into contracts or cooperative agreements with, private nonprofit organizations, resource partners, States, Tribes, and units of local government to ensure the delivery of free community navigator services to current or prospective owners of eligible businesses in order to improve access to assistance programs and resources made available because of the COVID–19 pandemic by Federal, State, Tribal, and local entities.

children.heading: Appropriations
children.label: 2 Appropriations
children.text: In addition to amounts otherwise available, there is appropriated to the Administrator for fiscal year 2021, out of any money in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, $100,000,000, to remain available until , for carrying out this subsection.September 30, 2022

children.heading: Promotion
children.label: 1 Promotion
children.text: The Administrator shall develop and implement a program to promote community navigator services to current or prospective owners of eligible businesses.

children.heading: Call center
children.label: 2 Call center
children.text: The Administrator shall establish a telephone hotline to offer information about Federal programs to assist eligible businesses and offer referral services to resource partners, community navigators, potential lenders, and other persons that the Administrator determines appropriate for current or prospective owners of eligible businesses.

children.label: A
children.text: conduct outreach and education, in the 10 most commonly spoken languages in the United States, to current or prospective owners of eligible businesses on community navigator services and other Federal programs to assist eligible businesses;

children.label: B
children.text: improve the website of the Administration to describe such community navigator services and other Federal programs; and

children.label: C
children.text: implement an education campaign by advertising in media targeted to current or prospective owners of eligible businesses.

children.heading: Appropriations
children.label: 4 Appropriations
children.text: In addition to amounts otherwise available, there is appropriated to the Administrator for fiscal year 2021, out of any money in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, $75,000,000, to remain available until , for carrying out this subsection.September 30, 2022

children.heading: Sunset
children.label: d Sunset
children.text: The authority of the Administrator to make grants under this section shall terminate on .December 31, 2025
